- Hunter Williams â€” 2025-03-02 [email threadId 1955918cc4dbdc51]: "Oral L-Carnitine (Including Acetyl L-Carnitine) has a very low bioavailabilityâ€”meaning your body only absorbs 10-18% of what you take."
- Hunter Williams â€” 2025-03-02 [email threadId 1955918cc4dbdc51]: "But can oral L-carnitine upregulate androgen receptors, increase ligand binding affinity, and enhance hypertrophy? Not really."
- Hunter Williams â€” 2025-03-02 [email threadId 1955918cc4dbdc51]: "Some people experience GI distress with oral L-Carnitineâ€”especially at higher doses. It can also increase TMAO (Trimethylamine-N-Oxide) levels, which has been linked to cardiovascular risks."
